channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: Samsung Teases Wider Foldable as Galaxy Z Fold 8 Camera Details Leak
item.description:
Samsung has teased a new wider foldable design while leaks reveal Galaxy Z Fold 8 camera specifications, suggesting incremental upgrades ahead of the July 2026 Unpacked event
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/technology/samsung-galaxy-z-fold-8-wide-foldable-leak-2026
